lb-0j0f.title: Add focus-visible styles and disabled button styling
lb-0j0f.description: Add :focus-visible styles for buttons, :disabled styles for buttons, and canvas focus ring

lb-11v3.title: Remove SurfaceType and surface from types and config
lb-11v3.description: In src/types.ts: delete SurfaceType type entirely. Remove 'surface: SurfaceType' field from MazeConfig. In src/maze/topology.ts: delete cylinderTopology, torusTopology, mobiusTopology, kleinTopology functions. Delete createTopology factory. Rename rectangleTopology to createRectangleTopology and export it directly. In App.tsx: remove 'surface' from DEFAULT_CONFIG, update all createTopology(config.surface, ...) calls to createRectangleTopology(rows, cols). In src/maze/difficulty.ts: update topology usage.

lb-19of.title: Maze solver with solution display
lb-19of.description: BFS solver from start to end, show/hide solution path on canvas

lb-1jf7.title: Custom start/end point selection
lb-1jf7.description: Allow users to click cells to set custom start and end points instead of hardcoded top-left/bottom-right

lb-1nq3.title: Improve mobile layout for config panel
lb-1nq3.description: The sidebar on mobile (max-width 700px) is limited to 200px which is too cramped. Make it scrollable and expand the height. Group action buttons into a row layout on mobile.

lb-2dui.title: Render crossing cells with bezier bridge effect
lb-2dui.description: Extend the bezier renderer to handle crossing cells (from maze.crossings map). For a crossing cell with over='v' (N-S is overpass): (1) Draw the E-W under-passage as two short stub walls (east and west walls of center, with round caps — they become the 'tunnel mouth' visuals). (2) Draw the N-S overpass walls as full continuous corridor walls through the cell, on top of the under-passage stubs. (3) The overpass walls cover the center of the under-passage stubs, creating the bridge visual. Use ctx.save/restore to draw under first, then over. The visual must clearly show which passage goes over which. For over='h' (E-W overpass), mirror the logic.

lb-2ejg.title: Canvas rendering + basic UI
lb-2ejg.description: Canvas maze drawing, wrap indicators, config panel, generate button

lb-2ux0.title: Fix Kruskal's edge deduplication performance
lb-2ux0.description: Replace O(n) Array.some() with Set<string> for wall key dedup in Kruskal's algorithm (both instant and animated versions)

lb-3d52.title: Seed-based maze generation
lb-3d52.description: Add deterministic seeded RNG so mazes can be reproduced. Show seed in UI and allow entering a seed to regenerate.

lb-3hv3.title: Fix existing lint errors
lb-3hv3.description: Fix 6 lint errors: unused vars, empty blocks, ref access during render

lb-3pqw.title: Implement weave maze generation per spec

lb-5q15.title: Phase 3: UX Improvements
lb-5q15.description: Third phase: solver animation, undo/redo in edit mode, zoom/pan, and UI polish

lb-83aa.title: Skinny pig theme refresh
lb-83aa.description: Make it unambiguous that a Skinny Pig is a hairless guinea pig. The reference photo is in src/assets/skinny-pig.jpg. Update branding, mascot, and UI copy accordingly.

lb-88gd.title: Skinny pig theming + polish
lb-88gd.description: Color palette, pig mascot, themed UI, topology info panel

lb-8krr.title: Print-friendly maze output
lb-8krr.description: Add CSS print styles so users can print mazes on paper. Hide UI controls, maximize maze size, use black/white colors.

lb-8rj8.title: Add SVG export option
lb-8rj8.description: Add SVG export alongside PNG. SVG gives better print quality and infinite scalability. Render maze to SVG string and trigger download.

lb-9ah2.title: Animated solver visualization
lb-9ah2.description: Animate the BFS solver step by step, showing exploration frontier and final path

lb-9bsm.title: Add maze size presets
lb-9bsm.description: Add Small/Medium/Large preset buttons to quickly set common maze sizes

lb-9wdb.title: Touch support for mobile devices
lb-9wdb.description: Add touch event handlers to MazeCanvas for pinch-to-zoom, touch-drag panning, and tap-to-interact. The responsive CSS exists but canvas only handles mouse events.

lb-bqnl.title: Add keyboard shortcut hints
lb-bqnl.description: Show keyboard shortcut hints (Ctrl+Z/Y for undo/redo in edit mode, mouse controls for zoom/pan) somewhere in the UI, e.g. a collapsible help section.

lb-cg1b.title: Keyboard accessibility + responsive polish
lb-cg1b.description: Keyboard nav for config, ARIA labels, mobile layout improvements

lb-e0y8.title: Add crossing density slider to ConfigPanel
lb-e0y8.description: In src/components/ConfigPanel.tsx: add a slider for crossingDensity (0 to 1, step 0.05, default 0.5) that is only visible when weave=true. Label it 'Crossing Density' with a description like 'Low = sparse crossings, High = dense crossings'. Wire it to onConfigChange({ ...config, crossingDensity: value }). The weave checkbox should remain but default to checked.

lb-ev4z.title: Smooth bezier corridor rendering
lb-ev4z.description: Replace the current rectangle-based corridor renderer with a smooth bezier wall renderer matching public/npmaze-reference.svg. The SVG reference uses a single path with L (line) and C (cubic bezier) segments to draw all wall segments. Quarter-circle bezier curves (using the 0.5523 approximation constant) are used at outer corridor corners. stroke-linecap=round gives smooth passage openings. The result is elegant curved corridors as seen in the reference SVG.

lb-f6la.title: Update solution path and explored cells for bezier renderer
lb-f6la.description: After switching to wall-path rendering, update how the solution path and solver animation explored cells are drawn. Solution path: draw a thick colored stroke along cell centers (moveTo/lineTo through solution cell sequence), lineWidth about 40% of cellSize, lineCap='round', lineJoin='round', semi-transparent. This already mostly works but verify it looks good with the new background style. Explored cells: instead of filling rectangles, draw a semi-transparent filled circle or rounded square at each explored cell center (radius = 35% of cellSize). This integrates better with the wall-based aesthetic.

lb-ffqj.title: Undo/redo in wall edit mode
lb-ffqj.description: Track wall toggle history and support ctrl+z/ctrl+shift+z in edit mode

lb-g3cf.title: True weave maze generation
lb-g3cf.description: Make the app actually generate weave mazes with meaningful crossing density. Currently the weave=true flag rarely produces crossings (DFS only tunnels at dead ends with strict conditions). Weave should be the default and primary experience. Add a crossing density control. Kruskal's algorithm is best suited for controlling crossing density in weave mazes.

lb-ibvq.title: Weave Maze App Overhaul
lb-ibvq.description: Transform the app to be a true weave maze generator. A weave maze is a PLANAR rectangle maze where paths can go over and under each other at crossing cells. Remove all non-planar topology options (cylinder, torus, Möbius, Klein). The maze is always a rectangle; the interesting feature is paths crossing over/under. Implement smooth bezier corridor rendering matching public/npmaze-reference.svg (quarter-circle wall curves). Update skinny pig theme to make clear these are hairless guinea pigs, referencing src/assets/skinny-pig.jpg.

lb-ilwf.title: Improve ARIA labels and screen reader support
lb-ilwf.description: Add aria-labels to theme toggle, pig emoji, canvas placement mode labels, seed input aria-describedby

lb-izgt.title: Share maze via URL parameters
lb-izgt.description: Encode maze config (seed, rows, cols, surface, algorithm, weave) in URL query params so users can share specific mazes with a link. Add a Copy Link button to the UI.

lb-j8xf.title: Zoom and pan for large mazes
lb-j8xf.description: Add mouse wheel zoom and drag-to-pan for better navigation of large mazes

lb-ku28.title: Accessibility & polish improvements
lb-ku28.description: Address accessibility gaps, disabled button styling, and minor UX issues

lb-l7l1.title: Non-Planar Maze Generator
lb-l7l1.description: Full maze generator app with non-planar topology support, UI, editing, and skinny pig theming

lb-lbkw.title: Fix MazeCanvas key={theme} causing unnecessary remount
lb-lbkw.description: Remove key={theme} from MazeCanvas to avoid resetting zoom/pan on theme change. Handle theme via redraw instead.

lb-m6dk.title: Export maze as PNG image
lb-m6dk.description: Add a button to export the current maze (with solution if shown) as a PNG image using canvas.toDataURL

lb-mbwq.title: Animated maze generation
lb-mbwq.description: Step-by-step animation of maze generation algorithm

lb-mx6x.title: Rewrite weave generation for genuine crossing density
lb-mx6x.description: Rewrite weave logic in src/maze/algorithms.ts so crossingDensity is meaningful. For Kruskal: before the main pass, identify candidate crossing cells (interior cells with all 4 neighbors). For each, with probability=crossingDensity, pre-commit it as a crossing by carving one direction pair and registering it in crossings map. Run normal Kruskal to complete connectivity on remaining edges. For DFS: attempt tunneling opportunistically during traversal (not only at dead ends) — if a straight-through visited cell is adjacent and rng() < crossingDensity, take the tunnel before checking regular neighbors. For Prim: add tunnel frontier entries with probability crossingDensity. All three algorithms must produce genuinely woven mazes at density 0.5 on 12x16 grid. Update both instant-generate and step-by-step animation variants.

lb-nkk2.title: Remove wrap indicators from renderer
lb-nkk2.description: In src/rendering/drawMaze.ts: delete the drawWrapIndicators() function and its call from drawMaze(). Remove the wrapColor() helper. Remove wrap-related color references (wrapNorth, wrapSouth, wrapEast, wrapWest, wrapFlip) from src/theme/colors.ts. These only made sense for non-planar topologies.

lb-pmk2.title: Maze statistics panel
lb-pmk2.description: Show maze stats: dead end count, longest path length, branching factor, total cells, total passages.

lb-riil.title: Phase 2: Polish & Features
lb-riil.description: Second phase: performance fixes, export, custom start/end, difficulty scoring

lb-rkmb.title: Strip topology system
lb-rkmb.description: Remove all non-rectangle topology code. The maze is always a flat rectangle. Surface type concept is deleted entirely. Every reference to SurfaceType, surface field in MazeConfig, createTopology factory with 5 variants, TopologyInfo component, and the surface selector dropdown must be removed. Replace all createTopology() calls with a direct rectangle topology (either inline or a single rectangleTopology() helper).

lb-t8lw.title: Project scaffold + core maze engine
lb-t8lw.description: Vite+React+TS scaffold, topology system, wall storage, DFS algorithm

lb-td2c.title: Use skinny pig photo as start marker
lb-td2c.description: Import src/assets/skinny-pig.jpg into the React app and use it to draw the start position marker on the maze canvas. In drawMaze.ts: replace the drawPig() programmatic drawing function with an HTMLImageElement loaded from the asset. Draw the image clipped to a circle at the start cell, scaled to fit within the cell. Keep a fallback to the programmatic pig if the image hasn't loaded yet. The pig image should make it immediately clear these are hairless guinea pigs (not regular guinea pigs).

lb-uc58.title: Weave support for Kruskal's and Prim's
lb-uc58.description: Extend weave maze support beyond DFS to Kruskal's and Prim's algorithms

lb-uz63.title: Implement 2D non-planar crossings (weave maze)
lb-uz63.description: Implement 2D weave mazes where paths can cross over/under each other within a single grid cell. See SPEC.md for updated requirements and theme details (skinny pigs = hairless guinea pigs).

lb-vewa.title: Add crossingDensity to MazeConfig and default weave=true
lb-vewa.description: In src/types.ts: add 'crossingDensity: number' (0.0 to 1.0) to MazeConfig. In App.tsx: set DEFAULT_CONFIG weave=true, crossingDensity=0.5. This makes weave mazes the default experience. crossingDensity controls what fraction of eligible crossing positions actually become crossings during generation.

lb-voc2.title: Edit mode + additional algorithms
lb-voc2.description: Wall toggle editing, Kruskal's, Prim's algorithms

lb-vr87.title: Remove surface selector and TopologyInfo from UI
lb-vr87.description: In src/components/ConfigPanel.tsx: remove the SURFACES array, the surface <select> dropdown, and surface-related desc text. Remove SurfaceType import. In src/components/TopologyInfo.tsx: delete the file entirely (it explains non-planar topologies, which no longer exist). In src/App.tsx: remove the <TopologyInfo> import and its use in the sidebar.

lb-x83f.title: Maze difficulty scoring
lb-x83f.description: Calculate and display maze difficulty based on solution path length ratio, decision points, dead-end ratio

lb-xkck.title: Implement wall-path bezier corridor renderer
lb-xkck.description: Rewrite drawMaze() in src/rendering/drawMaze.ts using the wall-path approach from public/npmaze-reference.svg. Approach: (1) White/light background fill for maze area. (2) For each cell, determine which of its 4 walls are present (blocked passages). (3) Trace each wall segment as a Canvas path using moveTo/lineTo. (4) At cell corners where two perpendicular walls meet at a convex corridor corner, replace the sharp corner with a quarter-circle bezier curve: cubic bezier with control points at radius * 0.5523 offset (where radius = cellSize/2 - wallGap). (5) Stroke entire path in one call with strokeStyle=COLORS.wallColor, lineWidth=wallThickness (about 15-20% of cellSize), lineCap='round'. The wall gap from cell edge determines how wide the corridor opening is. Target: visually match the smooth rounded corridors in the SVG reference.

lb-zs96.title: Dark mode toggle
lb-zs96.description: Add a dark/light theme toggle. Create dark color palette and persist preference in localStorage.

lb-zvha.title: Phase 4: Enhanced Interactivity
lb-zvha.description: Improve mobile support, add dark mode, and enhance maze interaction
